_comment: Human-curated overrides for Data Centre Watch. Each key is a PlanIt application 'name' (e.g. '26/01234/FUL') OR any unique id you choose for a standalone campaign not yet in the feed. Fields: light (green|amber|red), reasons[], campaign{name,url}, petition{label,url}, note, title. Set standalone:true for campaigns to show even if not matched in the live feed. The auto-score is overridden by whatever you set here.

auchtertool-cato.title: Cato — Auchtertool, Fife
auchtertool-cato.address: Land north-west of Auchtertool, near Burntisland, Fife
reasons: 600MW hyperscale — campaigners estimate ~20% of Scotland's energy
greenfield site, six 35m buildings dwarfing the village
planned over a 16th-century castle ruin and a wildlife site
auchtertool-cato.note: ILI Group's £5bn proposal, first of their planned 'Stoics' network. Live application at Fife Council — the public has a short window to comment. The first Scottish AI data centre to reach this stage (Edinburgh South Gyle) was rejected.

petition.label: Sign: Stop the Auchtertool data centre

lammermuirs-southside.title: Southside — Lammermuir Hills, Scottish Borders
lammermuirs-southside.address: Clawbare, near Longformacus, between Longformacus and Westruther
reasons: ~225MW campus in a Special Landscape Area
greenfield moorland — wildlife, dark skies, hill farming
industrialisation of a treasured rural landscape
lammermuirs-southside.note: Roxburghe Estates / Sunlaws Development Company's £2bn proposal. Pre-application stage; a formal application to Scottish Borders Council is expected later in 2026. Now is the time to be heard.
